entities.name: SAHEL
entities.description: A semi-arid region in Africa where rural livelihoods depend on ecosystem services

entities.name: ECOSYSTEM SERVICES ASSESSMENT
entities.description: The process of evaluating the benefits provided by ecosystems to humans

entities.name: SECONDARY DATA
entities.description: Existing data used for landscape scale assessments, often unavailable in poor regions

entities.name: POVERTY
entities.description: A state of economic hardship prevalent in the Sahel region

entities.name: PROVISIONING ECOSYSTEM SERVICES
entities.description: Material outputs from ecosystems that support human livelihoods

entities.name: LIVELIHOODS
entities.description: The means of securing basic necessities of life for rural populations

entities.name: EXTRAPOLATION METHOD
entities.description: A method to scale ecosystem service assessment results from village to administrative levels

entities.name: REMOTE SENSING
entities.description: Technology used to acquire information about the landscape from a distance

entities.name: HYBRID CLASSIFICATION METHOD
entities.description: A specific remote sensing technique used for landscape classification

entities.name: COMMUNITY INTERVIEWS
entities.description: Direct data collection from community members to supplement remote sensing

entities.name: LIVELIHOOD BENEFIT MAPS
entities.description: Spatial distributions of various livelihood benefits in the Sahelian landscape

entities.name: NUTRITIONAL DIVERSITY
entities.description: A livelihood benefit reflecting the variety of nutrients obtained from the landscape

entities.name: INCOME
entities.description: A livelihood benefit derived from the sale of ecosystem products

entities.name: INSURANCE/SAVING
entities.description: A livelihood benefit providing financial security against risks

entities.name: MATERIAL ASSETS AND ENERGY
entities.description: A livelihood benefit consisting of physical resources and fuel

entities.name: CROPS FOR CONSUMPTION
entities.description: Agricultural produce used directly for food by the community

entities.name: LAND USE DECISION MAKING
entities.description: The process of planning and managing land utilization
